sections.title: Standard dialogue before Monkey Madness II

lines.speaker: Oobapohk
lines.text: Sorry, I'm currently out of javelins.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after Monkey Madness II

lines.speaker: Oobapohk
lines.text: Would you like to buy or sell any javelins?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you sell me some dragon javelins?

lines.speaker: Oobapohk
lines.text: Dragon javelins? Haha, you'll be a chief advisor to the King before you ever hold a dragon javelin!
